Now, for those of you who aren't aware of what apartment IQ is, let's first and foremost, define that and start there.
So first and foremost, Apartment IQ is an automated market survey tool.
What we do is we look to your property website as well as your competitors websites every single day.
And we pull in publicly available data into reports that you can sort filter and extract to share with key stakeholders owners, any groups that need that data.
Now, really the big things that separate us from the competition is we leverage 100% public data.
So there's no need for you to plug things in data swap share call around.
We're going to do all of the heavy lifting for you.
And in addition to that, the data is updated every single day rather than weekly or monthly.
So you can really rest assured that the data that you're seeing is the most up to date that there possibly is.
And then in addition to that, we're also going to be currently tracking upwards of 3 million properties in the United States.
Your comps do not need to be affiliated with apartment IQ for us to track them.
So they don't need partners of Apartment IQ for us to track them.
Uh We can pull that data right from their publicly available property website where you advertise information to potential renters.
Now, today's session is for you.

If you have a question, I actually like being interrupted.

If you think about it, that's a huge time savings from having to manually call a comp or check out their website.
I've heard people tell me that when they're doing manual market surveys or even leveraging other tools, it's taking them upwards of a full day if not a couple of days to compile that data.
